channel.title: 7Alive Labs — Products & Tools
channel.description: Suno prompts, budget Excel, receipt scanner — buy once on Gumroad.

item.title: Suno AI Prompt Pack 2026 — 50 Prompts from DistroKid Artist
item.description: 50 battle-tested Suno v4.5 prompts. Dance Pop, Thai Pop, Lo-Fi. Buy once $7. Gumroad: https://ackermann08.gumroad.com/l/suno-en

item.title: Household Budget Excel 2026 — CHF/EUR, No Subscription
item.description: 11 categories, 12 months, auto-sums. Excel & Google Sheets. $9 one-time. Gumroad: https://ackermann08.gumroad.com/l/budget-en

item.title: Receipt Scanner Python — Photo to CSV for Freelancers
item.description: OpenAI Vision script. Migros, Coop, Aldi. $19 one-time, you own the code. Gumroad: https://ackermann08.gumroad.com/l/receipt-en

item.title: Freelancer Invoice Template Excel — VAT Ready
item.description: Auto-sum, 5 line items, PDF guide. $5 one-time. Gumroad: https://ackermann08.gumroad.com/l/invoice-en

item.title: Freelancer Toolkit Bundle — Budget + Invoice + Receipt
item.description: Three tools, one purchase. Save vs separate. $29 one-time. Gumroad: https://ackermann08.gumroad.com/l/bundle-en
